notes: California DMV oversees autonomous vehicle testing and deployment. Maintains databases of AV collision reports, disengagement reports, and testing permits. Relevant to AI safety — autonomous vehicle incidents are a form of AI safety failure.

match_nodes.description: Reports of collisions involving autonomous vehicles during testing in California.

data.description: Reports of collisions involving autonomous vehicles during testing in California.
data.notes: No formal report ID pattern. Reports published on DMV website.

match_nodes.description: Annual reports of autonomous vehicle disengagement events.

data.description: Annual reports of autonomous vehicle disengagement events — when the AV system hands control back to the human operator.
data.notes: Companies testing AVs in California must report disengagements annually.
